game.blackjack.action_need_funds: Insufficient funds to perform this action.
game.blackjack.controls: [+]/[-] Adjust Bet Multiplier  [←]/[→] Switch Hands  [Space] Hit  [Enter] Stand  [Z] Double Down  [X] Split  [C] Insurance  [R] Restart  [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.blackjack.description: Play against the dealer, manage your chips, and try to reach 21 points to win.
game.blackjack.details:
f%The game is divided into two rounds - Player round, Dealer round.
{tc:red}This game has rule modifications compared to the original.{tc:clear}
J / Q / K: Count as 10.
A: Dynamically calculates as 1 or 11.
A + J / Q / K: Blackjack, the strongest hand in the game. This hand forces the bet to be paid at 1.5x rate, can be stacked.

{tc:yellow}Player Round:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Adjust Bet Multiplier:{tc:clear} Adjust the current bet amount. Can also be adjusted individually after splitting.
{tc:light_cyan}Hit:{tc:clear} Draw a card from the deck and add it to your hand.
{tc:light_cyan}Double Down:{tc:clear} Double the bet, but you can only hit once more this round. Can be combined with multiplier adjustment.
{tc:light_cyan}Stand:{tc:clear} End the player's turn.
{tc:light_cyan}Split:{tc:clear} If the first two cards are the same, you can split them into two separate hands, each with its own bet.
{tc:light_cyan}Insurance:{tc:clear} Can be chosen if the player's starting total is less than 17. This round will be skipped without any actions, but the bet for the next round is forced to double. If the dealer has Blackjack this round, insurance is ineffective.

{tc:yellow}Dealer Round:{tc:clear}
The dealer takes their turn, drawing cards until reaching 17 or more, then compares with the player.
{tc:light_cyan}Bust:{tc:clear} Hand total exceeds 21. Even if both exceed, it's a loss.
{tc:light_cyan}Push:{tc:clear} Player and dealer totals are equal, or both bust.
{tc:light_cyan}Win Bet:{tc:clear} Player's total is closer to 21 without busting, or player has Blackjack, or dealer busts while player hasn't.
{tc:light_cyan}Lose Bet:{tc:clear} Dealer's total is closer to 21 without busting, or dealer has Blackjack, or player busts while dealer hasn't.

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[+]/[-]{tc:clear} Adjust bet multiplier
{tc:light_cyan}[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Switch hands (after split)
{tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Hit
{tc:light_cyan}[Enter]{tc:clear} Stand
{tc:light_cyan}[Z]{tc:clear} Double Down
{tc:light_cyan}[X]{tc:clear} Split
{tc:light_cyan}[C]{tc:clear} Insurance
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.blackjack.msg_bankrupt: You've lost all your chips, you damn gambler!
game.blackjack.msg_dealer_higher: Dealer has higher total, lose bet!
game.blackjack.msg_forced_double_applied: Insurance effect: This round forced double applied.
game.blackjack.msg_player_blackjack_insu: Player has Blackjack and took insurance! Win bet.
game.blackjack.msg_player_higher: Player has higher total, win bet!
game.blackjack.name: Blackjack
game.blackjack.warning: For simulation entertainment only. Please stay away from gambling.
warning.back_to_game_list_hint: Press ESC / Q to return to the game list
warning.enlarge_hint: Please enlarge the terminal window to continue.
